data.content: Returning parent to implementation because child foolery-26e7 was rejected. Violation: src/components/settings-sheet.tsx:65-67 hard-codes scopeRefinement.enabled=true in the Settings UI defaults, conflicting with the disabled-by-default contract in src/lib/schemas.ts:153-160. This lets the UI re-enable automatic scope refinement on save/reset, so the feature is not safely opt-in yet.
